_comment: P38 Orlando/Orange advisory-overlay sources (real, verified). City of Orlando + SJRWMD open GIS (public records; City disclaims legal-boundary accuracy) + statute/code portals. Load: python3 tools/source_currency.py seed-sources canonical-sources/jurisdiction-sources-orlando-seed.json

name: City of Orlando Local Historic Districts (ArcGIS FeatureServer)
extraction_hint: point-in-polygon on HistoricDistricts; watch editingInfo.lastEditDate for boundary change; re-run tools/geo_source_fetch.py --cache-orlando to refresh cached polygons
_license: City of Orlando open data / public records; City disclaims legal-boundary accuracy ('not legally binding','spatially inaccurate'); advisory only

name: City of Orlando Land Use Zoning (ArcGIS FeatureServer)
extraction_hint: point-in-polygon on Zoning + OverlayA-D; watch editingInfo.lastEditDate; setback NUMBERS live in Ch.58 code (not scraped)
_license: City of Orlando open data / public records; advisory only

name: Orlando City Code Ch. 62 (Historic Preservation) + COA rule
extraction_hint: cite adopted section (62.200 COA required) + district list; monitor the City page (code text on Municode is ToS-limited, not scraped)
_license: public ordinance (Georgia v. Public.Resource.Org); cite the section, do not reproduce Municode text

name: Orlando LDC Traditional City design standards (62.600 to 62.629) + Residential Standards Guide
extraction_hint: cite Traditional City section range + overlay legend; setback values live in Ch.58 tables (Municode, not scraped) -> null-flagged
_license: public ordinance; cite section, do not reproduce code text

name: ASCE 7 Hazard Tool / FBC wind maps (Vult, WBDR authoritative source)
extraction_hint: authoritative point Vult (Fig. 1609.3(2)) + WBDR determination; values null-flagged in records until a point query is run
_license: ASCE tool; wind-speed FACT is not copyrightable, cite the source

name: St. Johns River WMD open GIS (WMD + major drainage basin boundaries)
extraction_hint: point-in-polygon NAME (SJRWMD) + Major_Drainage_Basin_24K_2013 basin; Orange is a split county (south = SFWMD)
_license: Florida public records (SJRWMD open data); advisory only
